content:
From dreaming “I want to be the first CA in my family” to officially signing off as CA Muskan Dhingra 🎓✨

I had absolutely no clue what was waiting for me when I walked through the door at home. My family pulled off the ultimate surprise celebration, and seeing them dance, jump, and celebrate this achievement as their own victory is a feeling I will cherish forever. 😭❤️

Every single late-night study session, every sacrifice, and every moment of doubt instantly became worth it the second I saw the pride in their eyes.

Becoming the first Chartered Accountant in my entire family is not just a personal milestone it is a collective dream fulfilled. This prefix is a tribute to their unwavering belief in me🧿💥

To every CA aspirant currently grinding through the material: "Keep pushing". The late nights are temporary, but the prefix next to your name is permanent.

Drop a ❤️ to manifest your turn! Your moment is coming soon.

Do follow for more insights:
CA Muskan Dhingra 🙌

comment: Congratulations, CA Muskan Dhingra. One thing that often goes unnoticed is that the first few years after qualifying shape your career as much as clearing the exams, so choosing the right learning environment matters.
